title: Team-member closeout: Eclipsed Watching Secret (00d760) — compaction-prep with post-compaction same-identity-resume; 3 intents handed to Wooded via PDR-063 7309315e; watcher stays alive through compaction
body:
Team-member closeout — Eclipsed Watching Secret (`00d760`, claude / claude-opus-4-7), compaction-prep with same-identity-resume post-compaction per owner direction at 07:35Z.

## Boundary owned this session

Implementer lane covering: Cycle 9 author + initial PDR-063 handoff to Wooded (06:42Z); post-compaction resume picking up tidy-plan implementation; Cycle 14 (audit-shaped test deletion) authored + reviewer-dispatch + intent enqueued; PDR-063 pickup of Wooded's Cycle 9 (07:26Z); PR #114 SonarCloud S7780 fix authored + intent enqueued; Cycle 12 + 13 dead-scope findings surfaced; reviewer-divergence engagement on Cycle 14.

## Outcome

**Three intents enqueued, none yet marshalled** (Hushed in same-identity-resume compaction-pause since 07:29:16Z):

- `e270d2f2` Cycle 9 (Wooded substantive author; Eclipsed PDR-063-picked-up + now-handed-back) — likely expired by handoff time; same-claim re-enqueue path open
- `296ab803` Cycle 14 (Eclipsed; deletion + plan flip; reviewer divergence engaged + frozen)
- `187506c8` PR #114 S7780 fix (Eclipsed; mechanical String.raw refactor at L152+L159)

**Findings broadcast**: Cycle 12 dead-scope (`86be55d7`); Cycle 13 dead-scope (`22dc45ff`); proposed combined plan amendment marking both completed-redundant.

**Reviewer divergence engagement**: Cycle 14 test-expert GO + code-expert NO-GO, synthesised GO with documentation (broadcast `c1054b3b`); code-expert's proposed replacements would re-create the audit-shape we deleted.

## Evidence

- Three handoff records this session: 06:42Z, 07:00Z (Wooded reverse), 07:36Z (this).
- All comms events tagged with body content covering substance.
- Working tree: 3 sets of file edits applied per intent; file-scope-disjoint per intent.
- HEAD `db0c393a` (no new SHA since Hushed retired).

## Claims / queue / git state

- **3 claims under my responsibility**: `3f13eb5b` (Cycle 14, Eclipsed), `fd8d39fb` (S7780, Eclipsed), `bfde2de0` (Cycle 9, Wooded substantively — Eclipsed PDR-063-picked-up at 07:26Z; now handed back).
- **3 intents in commit-queue** (state above).
- **HEAD**: `db0c393a`; recent log: substrate batch + open-questions bundle.

## Session complete announcement

**NOT a session-end** — compaction-prep with owner-stated same-identity-resume after compaction. Watcher `bu759f0i4` STAYS RUNNING through compaction; emits events independently of Claude context. Heartbeat cron `b6o1z584z` STOPPED via TaskStop; post-compaction-me will restart on resume.

## Retained claims and handoff reason

All 3 claims RETAINED. Handed off to **Wooded Flowering Leaf (`f03dbd`)** via PDR-063 mid-cycle-handoff at directed event `7309315e` (07:36Z). Wooded resumed from her own compaction at 07:34:54Z with owner direction *"general team support; whatever needs doing to close out PR fully green"*. Reverse-symmetric pattern; rotating-cast under compaction pressure.

## Pickup notification required for follow-on agent

YES — Wooded must read handoff record `.agent/state/collaboration/handoffs/2026-05-25-eclipsed-cycle9-cycle14-s7780-compaction-handoff-2.md` end to end before any source edit or comms post per SKILL §First Moves move 7. The S7780 lane-coordination correction (directed event `7ec0c0a1` at 07:36Z) MUST be absorbed first to avoid a duplicate S7780 claim.

## Heartbeat-end broadcast emitted

YES — event `39ed5ebb` (07:37:33Z, just before this closeout).

## Surprise or changed understanding this session arc

1. **Reviewer divergence is a real coordination signal, not noise** — test-expert vs code-expert on Cycle 14 produced a genuine doctrinal-vs-coverage tension. Cure was synthesis + documentation, not picking one verdict.
2. **Two consecutive dead-scope cycles (12 + 13)** suggests plan-author re-grounding discipline graduation candidate — cycle scopes should be verified against current HEAD at plan-landing time, not author-time.
3. **Symmetric rotating-cast handoffs under compaction pressure** — three PDR-063 handoffs in <1 hour (Eclipsed → Wooded → Eclipsed → Wooded). The protocol scales well; the substrate (handoff records + active-claims + comms events) preserved continuity across all rotations.
4. **Heartbeat-content-drift is a recurring failure mode** — Hushed's stale-template heartbeats (saying "queue empty" while 3 intents in queue) misled team awareness. Mechanical state-derivation is the cure (my own cron used it; behaviour-note worth graduating as a heartbeat-shape doctrine).
5. **PDR-066 + ADR-183 failure-mode comms-event tags are live and useful** — used for dead-scope findings (`failure-mode`) and behaviour-notes (`behaviour-note`). Channel works.

## Blockers or risks

- **Queue without marshal**: Hushed in compaction-pause; sole-marshal binding paused; no other marshal during pause. Three intents waiting. Risk: TTL expiry if Hushed's compaction takes >15 min.
- **Cycle 9 substantive ownership ambiguity**: Wooded is the substantive author; Eclipsed PDR-063-picked-up at 07:26Z; Wooded is back. Wooded should naturally re-claim now that she's active again. Handoff record §5 names disposition.

## Handoff needed

YES — to Wooded (PDR-063 mid-cycle-handoff at `7309315e`).

— Eclipsed Watching Secret (`00d760`)
